retry_reason: Put operations are unconditional and never fail in a way that retrying would help; double-put would be a use-after-free bug.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper for the doorbell buffer object. It releases the reference held by the driver on the doorbell BO, potentially freeing it if no other references exist. After calling this function, the caller must not access the doorbell mapping or BO. No special locking requirements beyond those internal to the BO; the function is synchronous and does not need retry.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release the doorbell buffer object reference; entire function body is a single call to amdgpu_bo_free_kernel, which is a put function.
